div.p: On August 23, 1954, in Washington, representatives of the Governments of the United States and Pakistan signed an agreement extending emergency assistance by the United States to help relieve the effects of a flood disaster in East Pakistan. (Press release, Department of State Bulletin, September 6, 1954, page 338) The text of the agreement for Emergency Flood Relief Assistance is printed in 5 UST (pt. 2) 1779.
